message:
fix: wisp code cleanup — dead code, stale comments, minor bugs

- Remove unused wispLabelTable/wispDepTable routing helpers
- Update stale SQLite references in comments to generic "store"/"db"
- Add IF NOT EXISTS to wisps CREATE TABLE for defensive idempotency
- Fix claimWisp to read assignee within transaction on conflict
- Add closed_at auto-management (manageClosedAt) to updateWisp
- Route wisp IDs in batch DeleteIssues instead of silently no-oping

Closes: bd-hbivw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
